title: eulophia lonchophylla
intro: Eulophia lonchophylla, also known as the 'Eulophia orchid' or 'Long-tongued Eulophia', is a type of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to its alkaloids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Eulophia lonchylla include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, headache, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of Eulophia lonchophylla typically involve boiling or infusing the roots or leaves in water to create a tea or decoction that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
